"'''The Yuuzhan Vong Advance'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Sterling Hershey]] in [[2006]]. It depicts a battle between [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warriors]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces.

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
During the bleakest part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], a small force of New Republic stragglers faces a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] recon force that is sweeping the area for enemies. Another group of New Republic forces lay in wait to join at the battle. Unfortunately for them, the invaders also have more troops at their disposal and can call in a backup force. The planet's defenders must defeat the Yuuzhan Vong or risk enslavement and death.
